description: Audience/scope/contract_version envelope bound under signature for cross-context replay protection.

audience.description: Consumer-defined identifier the signature is bound to (e.g., the org_id or service principal).

contract_version.description: Semver-formatted protocol contract version pinned to the signing event. Major version must be >= 1; leading-zero majors are rejected per SDD section 3.6 PV-4.
